languages.text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

"Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"
"Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

languages.text: “你能否解释一下，为什么宫殿被士兵团团围住？”
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: “你能否解释一下，为什么宫殿被士兵团团围住？”

languages.text: « Vous voulez bien m'expliquer pourquoi le palais est entouré de soldats ? »
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous voulez bien m'expliquer pourquoi le palais est entouré de soldats ? »

languages.text: "Sarayın neden askerlerle çevrili olduğunu açıklamak ister misin?"
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: "Sarayın neden askerlerle çevrili olduğunu açıklamak ister misin?"

languages.text: «¿Podría explicarme por qué mi palacio está rodeado de soldados?».
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Podría explicarme por qué mi palacio está rodeado de soldados?».

languages.text: "Würdet Ihr mir bitte erklären, warum der Palast von Soldaten umstellt ist?"
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: "Würdet Ihr mir bitte erklären, warum der Palast von Soldaten umstellt ist?"

languages.text: 「宮殿が兵士に囲まれている理由を説明していただけますか？」
languages.original_text: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"

traits.locale_text: 「宮殿が兵士に囲まれている理由を説明していただけますか？」
